_comment: Storyboard map for meta-create-skill VIDEO 4: What a Skill System Is (CP3's explainer). 5 diagrams in teaching order, one column each, left to right. NOTE: the CP3 wizard deck OPENS with two borrowed slides from v2-types-of-skills (05-skill-vs-workflow, 06-how-they-chain) before column 1 below — those files stay in v2 and are referenced, not copied. The deck answers CHAINING and stops; hardening, harnesses and scheduling belong to CP4.
